channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Indiana Conservatives Oust Lawmakers After Redistricting Vote
item.description: Conservative activists in Indiana removed several Republican state lawmakers following a redistricting vote.

item.title: White House details record preservation systems
item.description: The White House revealed its methods for preserving presidential records in a filing with a federal judge this week.

item.title: Trump and Xi to Meet: Beyond the Taiwan Issue
item.description: Taiwan's status is a factor, but other issues are expected to be central to negotiations.

item.title: Reading 'Animal Farm' in Reverse
item.description: An examination of Orwell’s allegory from a different perspective.
